final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk
);
  wire [3:0] _tap_data_in = data_in & {4{1'b1}};


    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write data to SRAM
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Output stored data
    end
endmodule
